title: Penalty for violations
doc_html:
§537.  Penalty for violations

Every person convicted of a violation of any of the provisions of this Chapter for which another penalty is not specifically provided shall be fined not more than one hundred dollars, or imprisoned for not more than thirty days, or both.
doc_text:
§537.  Penalty for violations
Every person convicted of a violation of any of the provisions of this Chapter for which another penalty is not specifically provided shall be fined not more than one hundred dollars, or imprisoned for not more than thirty days, or both.
